overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character holding a lantern walking through rural countryside at night toward Braithwaite Manor. The scene transitions from open grassland to a formal tree-lined avenue with white wooden fences.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with scattered oak trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through open grassland holding a lantern to illuminate the path ahead

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through tall grass
large oak trees scattered across the open landscape
large oak trees scattered across the open landscape
tall green grass surrounding the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through open countryside at night, holding a lantern that casts a warm glow on the dirt path. Scattered oak trees dot the landscape under a clear starry sky, with tall grass swaying on either side of the trail.

events.description: white wooden fence becomes visible on the left marking the Braithwaite property boundary
character adjusts direction slightly right to approach the manor entrance sign

agents.ego_description: walking along the path with a white wooden fence now visible on the left, approaching the estate entrance

entered.detail: white wooden fence marking the property boundary of the estate
large white sign reading BRAITHWAITE MANOR at the entrance
massive oak tree trunk passed on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the path as a white wooden fence appears on the left, marking the estate boundary. The vegetation becomes denser with bushes, and a large sign for Braithwaite Manor becomes visible in the distance as the character approaches the entrance.

events.description: passing the Braithwaite Manor sign and entering the formal tree-lined avenue
road surface changes from dirt to gravel and fences appear on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking down the formal avenue toward the manor house, passing between rows of trees

entered.detail: formal avenue lined with large oak trees on both sides creating a tunnel effect
well-maintained gravel driveway leading to the manor

segments.scene_description: The character passes the Braithwaite Manor sign and enters a formal tree-lined avenue. The path becomes a gravel road with white wooden fences now visible on both sides, while the canopy of oak trees creates a dark tunnel effect ahead. Distant lights from the manor become visible through the trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet rural landscape at night, transitioning from open wilderness toward a structured path. It begins with a character walking along a dirt trail, where a handheld lantern casts a warm, flickering glow against the surrounding darkness. As the camera advances, the view expands to reveal scattered oak trees standing under a clear, starry sky. The scene then shifts focus to the tall grass swaying on either side of the trail before the path leads deeper into the nocturnal countryside.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open rural boundary of an estate into a formal, enclosed manor approach. It begins as the character moves along a path where a white wooden fence first appears on the left and the surrounding vegetation grows denser with thick bushes. As the character advances, a large sign for Braithwaite Manor emerges in the distance, marking the transition toward the estate entrance. The scene then shifts as the character passes the sign and enters a gravel road, with white wooden fences now flanking both sides of the path. Finally, the environment closes in as a canopy of oak trees creates a dark tunnel effect, through which the distant lights of the manor become visible.
